steps.title: Contrast fixed and blended forms
steps.content: The sentence contrasts recognizable traditional forms with unconventional forms that borrow from multiple genres. Morris's pieces straddle prose and poetry, so the blank needs to describe forms without clear fixed boundaries.

steps.title: Discard unrelated descriptions
steps.content: Choice A means scattered, not boundaryless. Choice C describes neutrality, which is unrelated to genre shape. Choice D means customary or traditional, the opposite of the unconventional blended forms described. The answer is B.
